_readme: Paste each block in MatrixTrade Control → Update → Validate → Accept. Adjust trade ids / planIds to match your book. Targets: AMZN 260–280 (mid 270), GOOGL 380–400 (mid 390). GOOGL note: structure retracting — wait, do not chase.

blocks.label: AMZN — set target zone 260-280 on fill (replace H00x)

proposal.notes: Target zone 260-280 (primary 270). Keep war-room case open until review completed.

blocks.label: GOOGL — set target zone 380-400 on fill (replace H00x)

proposal.notes: Target zone 380-400 (primary 390). Price looks retracting — do not chase; reassess entry/stop in Scout.

blocks.label: Revive expired scout + refresh strategy (replace PLAN-xxx)

proposal.thesis: Strategy refresh after expiry. AMZN target zone 260-280.
challenges: Prior window expired — levels must be revalidated
Do not treat expiry as thesis invalidation

proposal.notes: GOOGL retracting from highs. Target zone 380-400. Prefer wait/pullback over chase.
challenges: Late entry risk if chasing bounce
